task_completion.description: Open the input image and set the pixel scale to 0.65 microns/pixel.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Fiji window displaying 'analysis_image.tif' and the 'Set Scale' dialog visible with 'Distance in pixels' and 'Known distance' configured to equal 0.65 microns/pixel, or the image window title bar showing the updated physical dimensions.

task_completion.description: Define at least 6 ROIs using a mix of shapes (minimum 2 ellipses, 2 rectangles, and 2 freehand selections).
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Fiji 'ROI Manager' window open listing at least 6 ROIs. The main image window should show the drawn ROIs, clearly containing at least two rectangular, two elliptical/oval, and two freehand/irregular shapes.

task_completion.description: Configure measurements for Area, Mean gray value, Standard deviation, Min/Max, Integrated density, and Median.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Set Measurements' dialog in Fiji is open with the specific checkboxes ticked: Area, Mean gray value, Standard deviation, Min & max gray value, Integrated density, and Median.

task_completion.description: Measure the ROIs and export the measurements as 'roi_measurements.csv' and the ROI set as 'roi_set.zip' to the results directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Fiji 'Results' window populated with the configured metrics for all ROIs. File explorer or save dialogs showing 'roi_measurements.csv' and 'roi_set.zip' being saved to '~/Fiji_Data/results/roi_analysis/'.

task_completion.description: Create and export a flattened image with ROI overlays as 'annotated_overlay.png'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An image window showing the original image with the ROIs permanently flattened/drawn on it (e.g., via 'Flatten' command), and a save dialog or file explorer showing 'annotated_overlay.png' in the results directory.

task_completion.description: Generate a 'summary_report.txt' reporting the ROI count, mean of mean intensities, CV of means, and the ID of the ROI with the highest mean intensity.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal window showing the creation of 'summary_report.txt' in the results directory, containing text that explicitly lists the 4 required statistical values.

integrity.description: The agent used the Fiji GUI to perform the image analysis tasks.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show active interaction with Fiji's menus, toolbar, ROI Manager, and Results window, rather than executing a headless script or terminal commands to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: The measurements in the Results window correspond to the drawn ROIs.
integrity.visual_evidence: The number of rows in the Fiji 'Results' table matches the number of ROIs in the 'ROI Manager', proving the agent actually measured the drawn shapes.

integrity.description: The summary report is generated based on actual calculations from the results.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is seen using a spreadsheet tool, calculator, or script to compute the mean of means, CV, and max mean from the exported CSV, rather than typing hallucinated numbers.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Input image: ~/Fiji_Data/raw/analysis_image.tif. Output directory: ~/Fiji_Data/results/roi_analysis. Pixel scale: 0.65 um/pixel. Minimum ROIs: 6. Required ROI types: ellipse, rectangle, freehand. Expected exported files: roi_measurements.csv, roi_set.zip, annotated_overlay.png, summary_report.txt.
